zh.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick是Hugh de Morewick和Aline De Bertram的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德設分頓 查阿培爾利。他於1223年與Sibella De Umfreville在英國諾圖波藍德莫維其可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1190年被列為sheriff of cumberland。他去世於1251年在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯莫普斯 堂史普，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick是Hugh de Morewick和Aline De Bertram的儿子，出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德設分頓 查阿培爾利。他于1223年与Sibella De Umfreville在英国諾圖波藍德莫維其可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1190年被列为sheriff of cumberland。他去世于1251年在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯莫普斯 堂史普，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick was born in Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom as the son of Hugh de Morewick and Aline De Bertram. He married Sibella De Umfreville in 1223, in Morwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1190, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cumberland. He died in 1251, in Morpeth Township, Morpeth, Northumberland, England, and was buried in West Chevington, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick est né à Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Hugh de Morewick et Aline De Bertram. Il a épousé Sibella De Umfreville en 1223, à Morwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1190, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cumberland. Il est décédé en 1251, à Morpeth Township, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterré à West Chevington, Northumberland, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewickはイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチェヴィントン チャペルリーでHugh de MorewickとAline De Bertramの息子として生まれた。1223年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィックでSibella De Umfrevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1190年，職業はsheriff of cumberlandと記録されている。彼は1251年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスモーペス トウンシュイップで死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドウエスト チェヴィントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 처빙턴 차플리에서 Hugh de Morewick(와)과 Aline De Bertram의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1223년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모윅에서 Sibella De Umfreville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1190년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of cumberland이었다. 그는 1251년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 모르페스 타운시프에서 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 웨스트 처빙턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick nasceu em Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Hugh de Morewick e Aline De Bertram. Ele casou-se com Sibella De Umfreville em 1223, em Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1190, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cumberland. Ele faleceu em 1251, em Morpeth Township, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em West Chevington, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick родился в местности чевингтон чапелри, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Hugh de Morewick и Aline De Bertram. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibella De Umfreville в 1223 г. в местности морвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1190 году он работал по профессии sheriff of cumberland. Он умер в 1251 г. в местности морпет тоуншип, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия и был похоронен в местности вест чевингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick nació en Chevington Chapelry, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Hugh de Morewick y Aline De Bertram. Se casó con Sibella De Umfreville en 1223, en Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1190, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cumberland. Murió en 1251, en Morpeth Township, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en West Chevington, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
